introSection: Fridolin's verrückter Zauberexpress is a steel launched roller coaster located at Fantasiana in Strasswalchen, Salzburg, Austria. It opened to guests on 17 July 2021. Fridolin's verrückter Zauberexpress is German for Fridolin's Crazy Magic Express.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Fridolin's verrückter Zauberexpress is a steel launched roller coaster located at Fantasiana in Strasswalchen, Salzburg, Austria. It opened to guests on 17 July 2021. Fridolin's verrückter Zauberexpress is German for Fridolin's Crazy Magic Express.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.
